case_title: MARIA CASTRO VS. SHAKER HASSAN ITANI

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT ITANI, SHAKER HASSAN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CASTRO, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT ITANI, SHAKER HASSAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAR-16-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ITANI, SHAKER HASSAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-27-2018 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-30-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506; PURSUANT TO CCP 1.87, THE COURT GRANTS A ONE TIME CONTINUANCE CONDITIONED ON DEFENDANT'S PROOF OF MEDICAL EXCUSE OF ABSENCE. IF THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT APPEAR, THE MATTER WILL PROCEED TO ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN DEFENDANT'S ABSENCE.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDG PRO TEM FILED BY CASTRO, MARIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTRO, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ITANI, SHAKER HASSAN $7,850.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,940.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CASTRO, MARIA
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2018 BY JPT ANDREA MCGARY; APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY; NO EXHIBITS RETAINED; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NO REPORTED (D506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 05/07/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2018 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 04/27/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 05/07/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
